title: UK Government Awards Fresh Funding to Project Scaling Sustainable Aviation Fuel via Mission Zeroâ€™s DAC
content: The project â€” â€œAdvancing Sustainable Aviation via Power-to-Liquid and Direct Air Captureâ€ (ASAP-DAC) â€” is led by a consortium headed by alternative fuels developer Carbon Neutral Fuels, and includes io consulting as engineering partner and ourselves as Direct Air Capture (DAC) technology partner. It is one of 17 projects selected by the Department for Transport to share a pool of Â£63M in grant funding through the latest phase of its Advanced Fuel Fund.
